category_sources: source_facts.description says mon monitors hosts/services and alerts about problems; official GitHub README describes mon as a simple monitoring program with restart/error hooks.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mon; official GitHub repository title and README use mon(1).
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage is the GitHub repository, and its README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/tj/mon, so repo is null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions monitoring and alerts; official README says mon is written in C and documents restart/error alert hooks.
